notes: Pirate brotherhood: tag your contacts (⭐ Brotherhood, 🟢 Ally, 👁️ Watch, 🔴 Rival) and the mark follows their name in the Contacts tab, escort hire list, and raid cards. Each band now shows its home location and distance. New 📣 Call for support: summon a band even if it's far away — crews in your system fall in at once, distant ones travel in over a cycle (whether they come depends on standing, distance, your Dread and whether they're busy) and then stand by, ready to join a raid as an ally or an escort as a free volunteer. (Pirate-proposed cargo missions are coming next.)
